steps.title: Track the contrast
steps.content: The sentence says humanlike features can create a comforting semblance of humanity, but a robot that appears too similar to humans can make people feel more unsettled. The blank must contrast with “unsettled” and describe the calmer response that the designers hoped for.

steps.title: Eliminate mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A, “indifferent,” means not caring, not comforted. Choice B, “vindicated,” means shown to be right. Choice C, “revolted,” is too close to being unsettled and does not create the contrast after “than.” The remaining word means comforted or calmed. The answer is D.
